name: Power BI Desktop visual precheck

issues.description: The internal measure label is clipped at the bottom of KPI cards on all three pages.
All three evidence screenshots include the expanded Power BI Filters pane.
English report labels are mixed with zh-CN automatic display units and the unfiltered slicer state.
Product and Customer KPI sets and common header/footer requirements differ between ui-contract.json and report-design-spec.md.

next_action: Project owner must save or discard the unsaved PBIP state and approve the KPI contract direction before PBIR regeneration.
